title: Breakwave Tanker Report 4.23.2024

Main
VLCC Rates Continue to Soften Amid Subdued Activity and a Cautious Charterer Stance - With May fixing activity in full force, the VLCC freight market continued its descent

Bi-Weekly Report
• VLCC Rates Continue to Soften Amid Subdued Activity and a Cautious Charterer Stance - With May fixing activity in full
force, the VLCC freight market continued its descent, a trend evident across both the Atlantic and Pacific regions. Such
decline unfolded against a backdrop of subdued activity, mirroring the prevailing market sentiment. In the Middle East
